ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealership_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dealership */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealership */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "used_new" TEXT /* Whether the vehicle is used or new */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "consumer_rating" TEXT /* Average consumer rating of the vehicle */,
  "consumer_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of consumer reviews for the vehicle */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., Front-wheel Drive, Four-wheel Drive) */,
  "min_mpg" INTEGER /* Minimum miles per gallon (MPG) for the vehicle */,
  "max_mpg" INTEGER /* Maximum miles per gallon (MPG) for the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., 8-Speed Automatic, Automatic CVT) */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine specifications of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "stock_number" TEXT /* Stock number of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "exterior_color" TEXT /* Exterior color of the vehicle */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  "doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors of the vehicle */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats of the vehicle */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type of the vehicle (e.g., Front-wheel Drive, Rear-wheel Drive, Four-wheel Drive) */,
  "dealer_ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership that owns the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_dealer_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_ship_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., Dealer, Private Seller) */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the seller */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_seller_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the vehicle when listed by the seller */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was listed by the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_seller_mapping_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_seller_mapping_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event in the vehicle's history */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Listed, Sold, Serviced) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Salesperson, Customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Whether the vehicle is used or new
Average consumer rating of the vehicle
Number of consumer reviews for the vehicle
Type of drivetrain (e.g., Front-wheel Drive, Four-wheel Drive)
